sections.paragraph:
Original: בּהמות

Transliteration: behêmôth

Phonetic: be-hay-mohth'

BDB Definition:

  1. perhaps an extinct dinosaur
    1. a Diplodocus or Brachiosaurus, exact meaning unknown

Origin: in form a plural or H929, but really a singular of Egyptian derivation

TWOT entry: 208b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
